# Assessment Overview

This directory contains supplementary assessment fact documents generated for this report.

- [architecture-diagram.md](./architecture-diagram.md): Application architecture and component relationship diagrams.
- [dependency-map.md](./dependency-map.md): External dependency categories, versions, and compatibility risks.
- [api-service-contracts.md](./api-service-contracts.md): Service catalog, endpoint contracts, and communication sequence.
- [data-architecture.md](./data-architecture.md): Database configuration, ER model, and data ownership boundaries.
- [configuration-inventory.md](./configuration-inventory.md): Configuration sources, properties, runtime profiles, and secrets handling.
- [business-workflows.md](./business-workflows.md): Core domain workflows, decision logic, and business sequence.
